backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Payment type and functions to submit payments, retrieve all payments, filter by user, and filter by invoice number, with in-memory list storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented payment form features including dynamic field rendering, backend submission, and report table with export functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of frontend files including components, hooks, utilities, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme CSS variables for the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag and root div for mounting the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component rendering header, payment entry form section, payment records table section, and footer with attribution link.
frontend/src/components/PaymentEntryForm: Payment form component with conditional NEFT/Cheque field rendering, validation, submission to backend via mutation hook, and automatic form reset on success.
frontend/src/components/PaymentReportTab: Table component displaying all payment records with loading/error states and Excel export button using the exportToExcel utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, query caching, and automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all payments and submitting new payment entries to the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, mobile-optimized input styling, and minimum touch target sizes for accessibility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/excelExport.ts: Utility function to export payment records array to CSV format and trigger browser download with timestamped filename.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, responsive container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata documenting a mobile-friendly payment entry app with dynamic NEFT/Cheque forms, localStorage persistence, Excel export, and existing features including form validation and report generation.
